subject: A goblin holding a spear charges forward against massive Eldrazi tentacle limbs in a fiery volcanic landscape
description: A small goblin figure occupies the center of the image, crouching and thrusting a spear forward with evident aggression. The goblin is surrounded by massive curling tentacle-like Eldrazi appendages that dwarf the figure in scale. The entire scene is bathed in intense orange-gold fire light, with smoke and flame filling the background. The scale mismatch between the tiny goblin and the looming tentacles is the visual core of the composition — a reckless charge into overwhelming odds.
emotion: reckless bravery, defiance against overwhelming odds
